tr: Dün akşam yemek yediğimiz restoran harikaydı.
en: The restaurant where we ate dinner yesterday was great.
I can't find the keys which I put on the table.
This is the book which I talked about.

tr: Otobüste önümde oturan adam gazete okuyordu.
en: The man who sat in front of me on the bus was reading a newspaper.

tr: Geçen hafta sonu izlediğimiz film gerçekten mükemmeldi.
en: The movie which we watched last weekend was really perfect.
The hotel where we stayed was very comfortable.

tr: Dün Kadıköy'de yediğimiz pasta çok lezzetliydi.
en: The cake which we ate in Kadıköy yesterday was very delicious.

tr: Vintage kıyafetler satan dükkan caddenin solunda.
en: The store which sells vintage clothes is on the left of the street.

tr: Caddenin solunda vintage kıyafetler satan bir dükkan var.
en: There is a store which sells vintage clothes on the left of the street.

tr: Geçen yıl şampiyon olan takım bu!
en: This is the team which became champion last year!

tr: Kahvaltı ettiğim kafenin çok samimi bir atmosferi var.
en: The cafe where I have breakfast has a very cozy ambiance.
This is the house where I grew up.
The park where we went in our childhood was very beautiful.

tr: Bütün bir öğleden sonrayı geçirdiğimiz müze gerçekten güzeldi.
en: The museum where we spent the whole afternoon was really beautiful.

tr: Şu anda kullandığım telefon çok eski.
en: The phone which I am using now is very old.
I didn't like the book which you suggested.

tr: Bu, ailemle 20 yıl önce yaşadığım ev.
en: This is the house where I lived with my family 20 years ago.
This is the cat which stole the chicken in the house.

tr: Bu sabah gittiğimiz kafe çok kalabalıktı.
en: The cafe where we went this morning was very crowded.
I can't forget the movie which I watched yesterday.

tr: Geçen hafta sonu giydiğim ceketimi bulamıyorum.
en: I can't find the jacket which I wore last weekend.

tr: Hazırladığın akşam yemeği gerçekten çok lezzetliydi.
en: The dinner which you prepared was really delicious.

tr: Geçen hafta gittiğimiz yer çok kalabalıktı.
en: The place where we went last week was very crowded.
The cat which I saw yesterday was very cute.
The party which we went to last week was crazy.

tr: Geçen yıl gördüğümüz yer çok güzeldi.
en: The place which we saw last year was very beautiful.

tr: Onların yaşadığı yer çok zengin bir muhitte.
en: The place where they live is in a rich neighborhood.
The games which my children played were very innocent.
The events which my children experienced were very funny.

tr: Çocuklarımın ders çalıştığı yerler çok kötüydü.
en: The places where my children studied were very bad.

tr: Oğlumun gittiği okula gitmek ister misin?
en: Do you want to go to the school where my son went?
We met at the restaurant where we ate.
We saw them in the store where we did shopping.
The school where we went is very far.

tr: Tatile gittiğimiz yer küçük bir adada.
en: The place where we went on holiday is on a small island.
The play which we watched at the theatre was gorgeous.

tr: Bu sabah gittiğimiz kafedeki insanlar çok mutsuzdu.
en: The people in the cafe where we went this morning were very unhappy.
We liked the movie which we watched at the cinema.
I smelled the flowers which I saw in the garden.

tr: Geçen yıl gittiğimiz tatil köyünde Ali'yi gördük.
en: We saw Ali in the holiday village where we went last year.
The house where he lived was very old.

tr: Dün akşam gittiğimiz bar kalabalık değildi.
en: The bar where we went last night wasn't crowded.

tr: Yaz tatilinde gittiğimiz sahildeki kedileri hatırlıyor musun?
en: Do you remember the cats at the seaside where we went on summer holiday?

tr: Dün gördüğümüz manzara hakkında konuşmak ister misin?
en: Do you want to talk about the view which we saw yesterday?
I am thinking about the library where we went last week.

tr: Evde gördüğüm eski fotoğraf bana seni hatırlattı.
en: The old photo which I saw at home reminded me of you.

tr: Geçen hafta aldığımız arabayı sürmek ister misin?
en: Do you want to drive the car which we bought last week?

tr: Geçen akşam gittiğimiz düğündeki insanlar dans ettiler.
en: The people at the wedding where we went last night danced.

tr: Tatil için gittiğimiz otelin sahibi çok kabaydı.
en: The owner of the hotel where we went for the holiday was very rude.

tr: Dün akşam yediğimiz akşam yemeğindeki yemekler muhteşemdi.
en: The meals at the dinner which we had last night were excellent.

tr: Geçen yaz gittiğimiz dağ evini unuttun mu?
en: Did you forget the mountain house where we went last summer?

tr: Bu yaz gittiğimiz ormanı hatırlıyor musun?
en: Do you remember the forest where we went this summer?
How was the train in the amusement park where we went?
How was the mall where we went yesterday?

tr: Geçen hafta tırmandığımız dağ çok yüksekti.
en: The mountain which we climbed last week was very high.

tr: Yaz tatilinde gittiğimiz köydeki evler 100 yaşında.
en: The houses in the village where we went on summer holiday are one hundred years old.

tr: Geçen hafta gittiğimiz şehirdeki müze 300 yaşında.
en: The museum in the city where we went last week is three hundred years old.
The books in the library where we went were very old.
I got excited the moment when I saw you yesterday.
The day when we met was very beautiful.
The year when I started school, I was five years old.

tr: Onu ilk gördüğüm an ona aşık oldum.
en: The first moment when I saw her, I fell in love with her.
I was very busy the day when we moved.

tr: Mezun olduğum zaman çok mutlu oldum.
en: I was very happy when I graduated.

tr: Onun geldiği gece ben evde değildim.
en: I wasn't at home the night when he came.
You were busy when I called you.
We were walking the moment when the rain started.

tr: Her şeyin değiştiği gün, o gündü.
en: That was the day when everything changed.
I cried a lot the time when I lost her.

tr: Zamanın durduğu anı bilmek ister misin?
en: Do you want to know the moment when time stopped?

tr: Onun bana yardım ettiği zaman çok mutlu oldum.
en: I was very happy the time when she helped me.
I smile the time when I am happy.
We were very happy the day when the holiday started.
The war had started the year when she was born.
I remember the day when I passed the exam.
I can't forget the night when I saw her.
Were you here the day when it snowed?

tr: İşe başladığım zaman bir araba satın aldım.
en: I bought a car the time when I started my job.

tr: Onu affettiğim gün daha iyi hissettim.
en: I felt better the day when I forgave her.

tr: Onlar için her şeyin bittiği an buydu.
en: That was the moment when everything ended for them.

tr: Yazın başladığı gün kuşları dinlemek istiyorum.
en: I want to listen to the birds the day when summer begins.
We will be successful the time when we are happy.
It was raining the night when we met.
